name: coopers98/arweave-php
description: Pure-PHP native Arweave L1 transaction signer/encoder. Given an Arweave RSA JWK and bytes, produces and posts a wire-correct native (format 2) Arweave transaction. Signing, encoding, and transport only — no I/O of secrets, no framework coupling, never logs.

suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: PSR-18 client + PSR-17 factories for ArweaveClient (auto-discovered if installed)
suggest.nyholm/psr7: PSR-17 factories for ArweaveClient when paired with another PSR-18 client (auto-discovered fallback)
